final_decision.exact_quote: If you have concerns involving a merchant, you can take action immediately by filling out this form.
final_decision.justification: [NORMAL_FAQ] grounded generation; retrieval_score=0.72; verifier=pass; product_area_snapped=Visa Support->travel_support; exact_quote_source=deterministic_fallback
final_decision.response: To report a problem with your purchase, you can use the online form provided by Visa to report an in-store purchase issue. Additionally, if you have concerns involving a merchant, you can take action immediately by filling out a specific form for that purpose. Please note that Visa does not handle refunds or bans directly, as these actions are managed through your card issuer or bank.

input.Issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
